name: Bench Dip
cues: Hands on a bench behind you
execution_steps: Sit on the edge of a bench and grip the edge just outside your hips.
Slide your hips forward off the bench with legs extended in front and weight on your hands.
Bend the elbows straight back, lowering your hips until the elbows reach about 90 degrees.
Press through the heels of your hands back to full elbow extension, keeping elbows tucked.
good_when: You want a bodyweight triceps builder needing nothing but a bench.
Training at home or traveling with minimal equipment.
Finishing an arm session with higher-rep bodyweight work.
bad_when: You have cranky shoulders, since the behind-the-body position loads them at end range.
You want to train the long head in a deep overhead stretch (use an overhead extension).
You need precise small-increment progressive overload.
